title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Royal Enfield - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Royal Enfield - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Royal Enfield is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Royal Enfield:
Royal Enfield is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Royal Enfield!
